package rulecoverage

func PositiveErrorWrappingMisuse() string {
    ruleID := "error_wrapping_misuse"
    family := "errors"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "fmt.Errorf calls that reference err without %w."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
